Name: White Balance (32-bit)
Code:
# White Balance — 32-bit float precision
# Per-channel gain + gamma for precise color cast correction
# Gain: overall channel multiplier (1.0 = neutral)
# Gamma: midtone shift (>1 = brighten channel midtones, <1 = darken)
base_pix = PixelType(c)
mx = _MatrixAuto(c)
c32 = EnsureColorspaceSafe(c, "RGB24", matrix=mx)
c32 = ConvertToPlanarRGB(c32)
c32 = ConvertBits(c32, 32)
c32 = Expr(c32, "x {r_gain} * 0.0 max 1.0 min 1.0 {r_gamma} / pow", "x {g_gain} * 0.0 max 1.0 min 1.0 {g_gamma} / pow", "x {b_gain} * 0.0 max 1.0 min 1.0 {b_gamma} / pow")
# Restore 8-bit and return to the original pixel format so downstream filters
# never see a 32-bit float clip (ffmpeg 8+ rejects YUV420PS / RGBPS).
c8 = ConvertBits(c32, 8, dither=1)
c = EnsureColorspaceSafe(c8, base_pix, matrix=mx)

Controls.Description: Red gain. >1 warms the image, <1 reduces red cast
Red gamma. Adjusts red midtones without clipping highlights
Green gain. Usually close to 1.0 (reference channel)
Green gamma. Adjusts green midtones independently
Blue gain. >1 cools the image, <1 reduces blue cast
Blue gamma. Adjusts blue midtones independently
